name: Amrit Bharat Express
description: The Amrit Bharat Express is a superfast express service operated by Indian Railways, introduced in 2024. It is a non-air-conditioned, low-cost sleeper and unreserved service for long-distance travel connecting cities more than 800 km apart. The trainset uses push-pull technology with two locomotives on both ends and consists of 22 coaches total, divided into 20 passenger coaches and 2 parcel coaches. Manufactured by Integral Coach Factory in Chennai, the trainsets feature semi-permanent couplers that negate jerk effects for smoother travel.
